items.title: Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance
items.dek: The rapper "started feeling very ill" mid-way through the show in New York, her representative told US media.
items.body: The rapper "started feeling very ill" mid-way through the show in New York, her representative told US media.

items.title: 'My six-year-old has nosebleeds': Chiang Mai air pollution sparks health fears
items.dek: Chiang Mai now ranks among the world's most polluted cities as fires engulf the surrounding countryside.
items.body: Chiang Mai now ranks among the world's most polluted cities as fires engulf the surrounding countryside.
